revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月十二]][[zh:八月十二]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 12|qq=August 12}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|qid=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1736|en|1736|qid=Q6989|lt=1736|1=1736}} {{ill|September 16|en|September 16|qid=Q2897|lt=September 16|1=September 16}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|en|Tokugawa Yoshimune|qid=Q319664|lt=Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune}} appointed {{ill|Edokochōbugyō|ja|江戸町奉行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edokochōbugyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 町奉行|1=Machi-bugyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q908892}} {{ill|Ōoka Tadasuke|en|Ōoka Tadasuke|qid=Q1054143|lt=Ōoka Tadasuke|1=Ōoka Tadasuke}} as {{ill|Jisha-bugyō|en|Jisha-bugyō|qid=Q1036279|lt=Jisha Bugyō|1=Jisha-bugyō}} (citation needed), granting him treatment comparable to that of a {{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|qid=Q61982|lt=Daimyō|1=Daimyo}}. == Births == * {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|qid=Q598057|lt=Juei|1=Juei}} 1st year/{{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Chishō|1=Jishō}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1182|en|1182|qid=Q19708|lt=1182|1=1182}} {{ill|September 11|en|September 11|qid=Q2851|lt=September 11|1=September 11}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|en|Minamoto no Yoriie|qid=Q431052|lt=Minamoto no Yoriie|1=Minamoto no Yoriie}}, the 2nd {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (died {{ill|1204|en|1204|qid=Q5228|lt=1204|1=1204}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}}) – {{ill|Tsugaru Tsuguakira|en|Tsugaru Tsuguakira|qid=Q7849981|lt=Tsugaru Shōshō|1=Tsugaru Tsuguakira}}, the 12th head of the {{ill|Hirosaki Domain|en|Hirosaki Domain|qid=Q903555|lt=Hirosaki Domain|1=Hirosaki Domain}} (died {{ill|1916|en|1916|qid=Q2087|lt=1916|1=1916}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|September 27|en|September 27|qid=Q2884|lt=September 27|1=September 27}}) – {{ill|Shimizu Sumizumi|ja|清水澄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimizu Sumizumi|1=Tōru Shimizu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1275139}}, a legal scholar (died {{ill|1947|en|1947|qid=Q5263|lt=1947|1=1947}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1734|en|1734|qid=Q6977|lt=1734|1=1734}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}) – {{ill|Muro Kyūsō|en|Muro Kyūsō|qid=Q6565179|lt=Muro Hatosu|1=Muro Kyūsō}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125199930}}) (born {{ill|1658|en|1658|qid=Q6991|lt=1658|1=1658}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1796|en|1796|qid=Q7818|lt=1796|1=1796}} {{ill|September 13|en|September 13|qid=Q2848|lt=September 13|1=September 13}}) – {{ill|Date Narimura|en|Date Narimura|qid=Q5227543|lt=Date Saimura|1=Date Narimura}}, head of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|qid=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain|1=Sendai Domain}} (born {{ill|1775|en|1775|qid=Q7700|lt=1775|1=1775}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|11|8|13|7|12|9|8|0812|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 8월 12일]] [[ja:8月12日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月十二]]
[[ar:August 12 (Lunisolar)]]
